channel.title: ios on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in ios on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog

item.title: jQuery iTunes Store Search
item.description: Hi, today i would like you to present this little plugin i’ve made for you, and I’m of course talking about jQuery iTunes Store Search Plugin.

item.title: ContactEditor ANE patch for iOS6, XCode 4.5 and Adobe AIR 3.5 SDK
item.description: Hi guys, today i would like to share with you a little patch i’ve worked yesterday helping a friend having the work done :) I’m talking about a little ANE extension for Adobe Flash Builder (aka Adobe AIR SDK 3.
